heading: Regulations governing availability of appropriations for House committee employees
label: 4312 Regulations governing availability of appropriations for House committee employees
text: Appropriations for committee employees shall be available in such amounts and under such regulations as may be approved by the Committee on House Oversight for compensation of employees of the standing committees of the House of Representatives, except the Committee on Appropriations.
notes: CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 72b of this title
Amendments1996— substituted “House Oversight” for “House Administration”.Pub. L. 104–186

Change of NameCommittee on House Oversight of House of Representatives changed to Committee on House Administration of House of Representatives by House Resolution No. 5, One Hundred Sixth Congress, .Jan. 6, 1999
amendments: Amendments1996— substituted “House Oversight” for “House Administration”.Pub. L. 104–186
